reviews.author: Tansha A
reviews.review_body: Good school. Kochi is  the best 👍💯one and coimbatore also good campus. Hyderabad campus they have started just a year back. Very good institutions for kids. Parents who wants their kid to be shine in all the way TIPS is the right choice

reviews.school_name: The Indian Public School(TIPS)-L & T Serene - Himayath Sagar
reviews.author: Azhar uddin
reviews.review_body: As i Went to fill fuel in my car around 8 o’clock in the morning, After filling the fuel the person came to collects the payment and I started my car and dived front but the fuel pipe was not taken out of the car and I came off. The manager at the fuel pump was so rude and he was telling that I should look wether they taken out the fuel pipe or not and the person who filled the fuel in my car was doing other work after collecting the payment rather he remove the fuel pipe and there was no sound and not intimate from the person who was stand next to the car. Because of the person negligence on duty, I paid 7500/-. I need justice for this because I have no idea why I paid 7500 to the fuel pump.
